name: Pico Devimon

signature_move.name: Pico Darts
signature_move.description: Throws a gigantic syringe at the opponent, draining their blood.

description: A tiny familiar Digimon which has the appearance of a bat. It exists to serve as a familiar for higher-class Digimon like Devimon and Vamdemon , but it is also said to be the one responsible for tempting Devimon, who was an angel-species Digimon, and luring it to the Dark Side. Although its offensive ability and the like are not strong, it is cunning and makes mischief all over. It prefers the dark, and is often with a higher-level Digimon at all times, so it seems that it is seldom observed on its own. Its Special Move is throwing a gigantic syringe at the opponent, draining their blood ( Pico Darts ).
